title: Praefect
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Praefects''' were the heads of the fourteen sects of the [[Ulizra]], the state-wide religion practiced by the members of the [[Nazzri]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The praefects were part of the oligarchical theocracy that ruled the Nazzri, along with the [[King/Legends|king]]. Their powers included presenting potential laws and calling for votes on them, amendments to an individual's rights as given to them by the state, and enforcing the isolationist policy of the Nazzri.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
